products.name: Royal Kundan Bridal Set
products.description: An opulent masterpiece of Kundan craftsmanship, this bridal set is designed for the modern queen who cherishes her heritage. Features intricate stone settings and a heavy gold base.

products.name: Eternity Diamond Ring
products.description: A timeless 18KT gold band adorned with brilliant-cut diamonds, celebrating love that lasts an eternity. Perfect for engagements or significant anniversaries.

products.name: Signature Gold Kadha
products.description: A bold and powerful 22KT gold kadha for men, symbolizing strength and status. Features a subtle matte finish with polished highlights.

products.name: Twin Souls Bands
products.description: Matching 18KT gold bands for those who have found their missing half. An elegant symbol of union and eternal commitment.

products.name: Temple Heritage Jhumkas
products.description: Traditional temple-style jhumkas featuring divine motifs and a cascading pearl drop. A staple for any festive occasion.

products.name: Maharaja Gold Chain
products.description: A heavy-weight 22KT solid gold chain with a complex link pattern, designed for the man of distinction. Robust yet incredibly refined.

products.name: Floral Navratna Necklace
products.description: Celebrating the power of nature, this 22KT gold necklace features nine precious gemstones in an intricate floral arrangement.

products.name: Dapper Gold Cufflinks
products.description: Classic 18KT gold cufflinks that add a touch of quiet luxury to any tailored suit. The perfect finishing touch for a gentleman.

products.name: Infinite Bond Necklace
products.description: Two interlocking circles representing an unbreakable connection. A minimal, modern piece that carries deep sentimental value.

products.name: Polki Diamond Choker
products.description: Uncut Polki diamonds set in a broad gold choker. This is the definition of royal bridal elegance, designed to be the centerpiece of your wedding ensemble.
